top3.sql:
SELECT 
    (T1."T-CHO" - T2."T-CHO") * 100.0 / T1."T-CHO" AS decrease_rate
FROM 
    Laboratory T1
JOIN 
    Patient P ON T1.ID = P.ID
JOIN 
    Laboratory T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID
WHERE 
    P.Birthday = '1959-02-18'
    AND strftime('%Y-%m', T1."Date") = '1981-11'
    AND strftime('%Y-%m', T2."Date") = '1981-12';

SELECT 
    (T1."T-CHO" - T2."T-CHO") * 100.0 / T1."T-CHO" AS decrease_rate
FROM 
    Laboratory T1
JOIN 
    Patient P ON T1.ID = P.ID
JOIN 
    Laboratory T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID
WHERE 
    P.Birthday = '1959-02-18'
    AND strftime('%Y-%m', T1."Date") = '1981-11'
    AND strftime('%Y-%m', T2."Date") = '1981-12';

SELECT 
    (T_nov."T-CHO" - T_dec."T-CHO") * 100.0 / T_nov."T-CHO" AS decrease_rate
FROM 
    Patient P
JOIN 
    Laboratory T_nov ON P.ID = T_nov.ID
JOIN 
    Laboratory T_dec ON P.ID = T_dec.ID
WHERE 
    P.Birthday = '1959-02-18'
    AND strftime('%Y-%m', T_nov."Date") = '1981-11'
    AND strftime('%Y-%m', T_dec."Date") = '1981-12';

SELECT 
    (T1."T-CHO" - T2."T-CHO") * 100.0 / T1."T-CHO" AS decrease_rate
FROM 
    Laboratory T1
JOIN 
    Patient P ON T1.ID = P.ID
JOIN 
    Laboratory T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID
WHERE 
    P.Birthday = '1959-02-18'
    AND strftime('%Y-%m', T1."Date") = '1981-11'
    AND strftime('%Y-%m', T2."Date") = '1981-12';

SELECT 
    (nov."T-CHO" - dec."T-CHO") * 100.0 / nov."T-CHO" AS decrease_rate
FROM 
    Patient p
JOIN 
    Laboratory nov ON p.ID = nov.ID
JOIN 
    Laboratory dec ON p.ID = dec.ID
WHERE 
    p.Birthday = '1959-02-18'
    AND date(nov."Date") >= '1981-11-01' AND date(nov."Date") < '1981-12-01'
    AND date(dec."Date") >= '1981-12-01' AND date(dec."Date") < '1982-01-01'
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    (T1."T-CHO" - T2."T-CHO") * 100.0 / T1."T-CHO" AS decrease_rate
FROM 
    Laboratory T1
JOIN 
    Patient P ON T1.ID = P.ID
JOIN 
    Laboratory T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID
WHERE 
    P.Birthday = '1959-02-18'
    AND strftime('%Y', T1."Date") = '1981' AND strftime('%m', T1."Date") = '11'
    AND strftime('%Y', T2."Date") = '1981' AND strftime('%m', T2."Date") = '12';

final.sql:
SELECT 
    (T1."T-CHO" - T2."T-CHO") * 100.0 / T1."T-CHO" AS decrease_rate
FROM 
    Laboratory T1
JOIN 
    Patient P ON T1.ID = P.ID
JOIN 
    Laboratory T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID
WHERE 
    P.Birthday = '1959-02-18'
    AND strftime('%Y-%m', T1."Date") = '1981-11'
    AND strftime('%Y-%m', T2."Date") = '1981-12';
